TaskDescription: Three-class motor imagery of the same upper extremity: rest, grasping (MI-GRASP), and elbow flexion (MI-ELBOW). 20 trials per class per session, 4 sessions per subject. Trial duration: 3.0s, cue: 3.0s, imagery: 3.0s.
Instructions: REST: relax without movement. MI-GRASP: imagine opening and closing all fingers to grab an object. MI-ELBOW: imagine moving the forearm up and down.
InstitutionalDepartmentName: MENRVA Research Group, Schools of Mechatronic Systems Engineering and Engineering Science
